mapper.sql: id, reqno,data_date, clinical_notes, data_json, filter_data_json, struct_data_json, create_time, last_time
mapper.select: select top 1 last_time from item_time_set order by last_time desc

SELECT reqno FROM pat_infor -- WHERE reqno = '2601247612' -- WHERE reqno = '260215773' -- WHERE reqno = '260304412' -- WHERE reqno = '260302506' -- WHERE reqno IS NOT NULL where reqno in ('260302506', '2601247612', '260125429', '260124371','260118051', '260122324', '260117982', '260115913', '260118631') GROUP BY reqno order by reqno desc

SELECT reqno, pathosid, sex, age + ageunit AS age, d1.data_name AS disname, CASE WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), outhodate, 120) = '9999-12-31' THEN '在院' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), outhodate, 120) END AS outhodate, inhosdate AS inhosday, d2.data_name AS inhosdistrict, DATEDIFF(DAY, inhosdate, CASE WHEN outhodate = '9999-12-31' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE outhodate END) AS hosdays FROM pat_infor pat LEFT JOIN district_dict d1 ON pat.currentdist = d1.datano LEFT JOIN district_dict d2 ON pat.inhosdict = d2.datano LEFT JOIN district_custom d3 ON pat.currentdept = d3.datano WHERE 1 = 1 AND pat.reqno = #{reqno} and ( coalesce('0','0')='0' or (coalesce('0','0')='1' and (coalesce(d1.depcss,'_')='本院' or coalesce('本院','_')='_'))
)

SELECT TOP (#{limit}) prd.reqno FROM patient_raw_data prd WHERE prd.data_json IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_summary ps WHERE ps.reqno = prd.reqno AND ps.update_time >= prd.last_time )
GROUP BY prd.reqno ORDER BY MIN(prd.last_time) ASC
SELECT TOP (#{limit}) prd.reqno FROM patient_raw_data prd WHERE prd.struct_data_json IS NULL AND prd.data_json IS NOT NULL GROUP BY prd.reqno ORDER BY MIN(prd.id) ASC

SELECT prd.id, prd.reqno, prd.data_date, prd.data_json, prd.create_time, prd.last_time FROM patient_raw_data prd WHERE prd.reqno = #{reqno} AND prd.data_json IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_summary ps WHERE ps.reqno = prd.reqno AND ps.update_time >= prd.last_time )
ORDER BY prd.last_time ASC, prd.id ASC
